name: QA 856
description:
PCP QA Test No. 856

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 856

Check PMCD state change notification, aka PMCD_ADD_AGENT



Copyright (c) 2016 Red Hat, Inc.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
